Package g12.p2.cst438.g12_springboot

Class WorkoutController

java.lang.Object
g12.p2.cst438.g12_springboot.WorkoutController
@RestController public class WorkoutController extends Object

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Workout>
    addWorkout(Workout workout)
    POST endpoint to add a Workout.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void>

    DELETE endpoint to delete a Workout with the provided ID from the DB.

    getAllWorkouts()
    GET endpoint to get all Workouts present in the DB.

    GET endpoint to get all Workouts associated with a given User ID.

  • Method Details

    • getAllWorkouts

      @GetMapping("/getAllWorkouts") public List<Workout> getAllWorkouts()
      GET endpoint to get all Workouts present in the DB.
      Returns:
      Java List with all workouts in the DB.

    • getWorkoutById

      @GetMapping("/getWorkoutById") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Workout> getWorkoutById(Long id)
      GET endpoint to get a single Workout by its ID.
      Parameters:
      id - ID of the workout to get from the DB.
      Returns:
      Workout object with the given ID, or an HTTP 404 if no such Workout exists.

    • getWorkoutsByUser

      @GetMapping("/getWorkoutsByUser") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<Workout>> getWorkoutsByUser(Long userId)
      GET endpoint to get all Workouts associated with a given User ID.
      Parameters:
      userId - ID of the User to get workouts for.
      Returns:
      Java List of Workouts associated with the provided User ID, 404s if no such Workouts exist (or User DNE)

    • addWorkout

      @PostMapping("/addWorkout") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Workout> addWorkout(@RequestBody Workout workout)
      POST endpoint to add a Workout.
      Parameters:
      workout - New Workout object to add to the DB.
      Returns:
      Java Workout object that was added.

    • updateWorkout

      @PutMapping("/updateWorkout") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Workout> updateWorkout(@RequestBody Workout workout)
      PUT endpoint to update the provided Workout.
      Parameters:
      workout - Updated Workout object to replace the old.
      Returns:
      The newly-saved Workout object, or a 404 if no such Workout exists already.

    • deleteWorkout

      @DeleteMapping("/deleteWorkout") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> deleteWorkout(Long id)
      DELETE endpoint to delete a Workout with the provided ID from the DB.
      Parameters:
      id - ID of the workout to be deleted
      Returns:
      HTTP 204 on success, or 404 if no Workout with that ID exists in the DB.
